title: Prompt-level: bake plan-quality heuristics + authoritative WASC structure into generation
description: Govern the 14 spec snippets + shared preamble so the generated draft natively satisfies the binding heuristics (R-0009), the authoritative reviewer feedback (R-0007), the authoritative ACS-WASC structure (R-0008), and the role model (DEC-48). Decomposed into slices: A (prompt-only register+content), B (in/out-of-class grounding), C (grounding-leanness), D (measurement-binding gate). Criterion 7 (per-Goal header) RELOCATED to FEAT-007 (net-new model/parser, not a prompt bake). Sources: docs/prompt-workflow-refinement-governing-options-2026-06-08.md (R-0011).
acceptance_criteria: Generated action steps distribute ownership across the divisions/positions whose responsibilities justify them; no single-department overload.
The plan covers both in-class and out-of-class contexts, using the seeded SAO + HRT/YGL/Dormitory Teacher out-of-lesson roles.
Relevant actions carry bilingual (Chinese-English) dual-purpose framing.
Each action step states its mechanism (HOW) and its frequency/cadence.
Action steps span diverse focus areas (school-wide), not concentrated.
Each success criterion binds a concrete measurement instrument + cadence; KPI exclusion held (numbers only inside a target criterion).
Descriptions never meta-invoke WASC certification/accreditation risk; a standard is given as key + name; Theme is the title, not success-criteria narrative.
Verbatim catalogue-label fidelity is preserved (no contraction/rename).
Each spec's grounding carries only what its task consumes (grounding-leanness).
